mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO friendship
user_one_id, user_two_id, direct_room_id, created_at, updated_at,
#{userOneId}, #{userTwoId}, #{directRoomId}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt},
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_one_id, user_two_id, direct_room_id, created_at, updated_at FROM friendship WHERE user_one_id = #{userOneId} AND user_two_id = #{userTwoId} LIMIT 1
